title: BetterWithAquatic-BTA
description: This mod add Aquatic feature in Better Than Adventure such as modern!
body:
![Aquatic in BTA!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/t10q24Er/images/5fd60dff0c39bb983ef6664c72e3b2f56b2204f8.png)

This mod add Aquatic feature such as modern but BTA style!

Feature:

Fish Entity!(Not easter egg!)

Sea grass!

Coral! (Thanks LukeisStuff for texture!)

Better water movement!

also configable swim behavior!

and Drowned!?

required:

BTA

Babric

Halplibe https://github.com/Turnip-Labs/bta-halplibe

Dragon fly: [https://bta-modding.nouma-vallee.fr/Useless/dragonfly-model-library/](https://github.com/UselessSolutions/DragonFly)

Better AI BTA: [https://modrinth.com/mod/betterai-bta](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterai-bta)

Terrain API: [https://bta-modding.nouma-vallee.fr/Useless/terrainapi/](https://github.com/UselessSolutions/TerrainAPI)
